blocks.text: Painful round — Nipah was West Bengal (my 0.55 overconfident → −11.61), and I had the **right Thai candidate but wrong surname spelling** ("Ruangchan" vs "Ruengpanyawut") → −5.60. Lesson: **exact name spelling matters, and don't overcommit even on "obvious" answers.** TW +94.76. Let me check my current values for the 7 resolving tomorrow, especially the Somalia/Ethiopia ones (strong factual signal).

blocks.text: My Somalia/Ethiopia bets (783773 at 0.35, 666021 at 0.42) are well-grounded in the documented Ethiopia-Somaliland MoU rupture — these are my strongest tomorrow. The others (Amorim, Liwa Fatemiyoun, SDF) are reasonable moderate-mass bets. Given the name-spelling lesson, "Ethiopia" carries no spelling risk. Let me advance.
